commands.review_summary:
This PR adds AAMA Phase 1 approval-token enforcement across outbound sends, gateway send/poll requests, session-memory writes, durable SQLite state/audit logging, protocol schema fields, fixtures, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: PR-head source inspection shows the missing-token suspension, gateway approval-context omissions, broad plugin-action gating, and ignored actionBlocked result; live PR status also shows failing protocol and secrets checks. I did not run a real gateway/session setup, so this is source-reproducible rather than live-reproduced.
